content.summary: Per-instance color and scale variation using a data texture. Each instance samples its color from a 1D texture row and applies noise-based scale variation. The pixel shader uses TouchDesigner's built-in TDLighting for Phong shading across all scene lights.
warnings: Render TOP instancing must be enabled and connected to a CHOP with enough samples
uColorTex must have width >= uInstanceCount (one pixel per instance)

uniforms.description: Data texture with one pixel per instance (RGBA = color)
uniforms.name: uColorTex

uniforms.description: How much scale differs between instances (0-1)
uniforms.name: uScaleVariation
